title: Permlyyn Client
description: This is a Client like lunar but is faster and more lightweight
body:
A client like lunar 
*All the features are of the mods not native features like lunar
##  Performance
I am currently getting 200 fps on an intel core i5-6500cpu nad integrated graphics intel core 530 gpu
# Features
- Full Optifine parity
- Improved UI
- Customizable GUI screens
- Enhanced Visuals
- Ability to pin worlds
- Chunk pre-generation
- Tweaks
- Super FPS & TPS
- Emoji Support
- Fullbright
- Customizable On-screen HUD
- Shader support
- Tells about what you are looking at
- Dynamic lights
- Schematics
- In-game notepad
- Performance profiling
- Open-to-LAN for anyone
- High resolution screenshots
- In-Game texture pack/map/datapack browser
- Enhanced book Interface
- Join servers with different versions
